consentText.required: I agree to the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy, including Emmaline's handling of call audio, transcripts, notes, uploaded documents, and AI processing.
consentText.marketing: I agree to receive the educational newsletter and product updates from Emmaline. I can unsubscribe at any time.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
intro: Emmaline is a product of Planting Moon LLC, located at 5830 E 2nd St, Ste 7000 #35119, Casper, Wyoming 82609.
This Privacy Policy explains how Emmaline collects, uses, stores, and shares information when you use the Emmaline mobile app, website, and related services.
Emmaline is a voice-first AI assistant. That means some of the information you share with us may include voice audio, transcripts, notes, uploaded documents, and support messages.

sections.title: Information We Collect
body: We collect account details you provide directly, such as your email address, password, marketing preferences, and support messages.
When you use voice and reader features, we may collect call audio, call metadata, transcripts, summaries, notes, uploaded text or PDF content, and usage records tied to your account.
bullets: Account information such as email address and authentication details
Call audio, call timestamps, phone assignment metadata, transcripts, summaries, and note content
Reader uploads and pasted text you ask Emmaline to read or process
Support form submissions, deletion requests, and consent records
Device and request metadata needed for security, fraud prevention, and service operations

sections.title: How We Use Information
body: We use information to provide the service, authenticate users, power voice calls, generate transcripts and summaries, respond to support requests, manage subscriptions if offered, and improve reliability.
We do not currently use third-party advertising networks inside the app or website.
bullets: Deliver voice, transcript, note, reader, and account features
Process AI-generated responses, summaries, and speech features
Send operational emails such as support replies or account notices
Send optional newsletters and product updates only if you opt in
Maintain security, prevent abuse, and investigate service issues

sections.title: Permissions and Sensitive Features
body: The app requests microphone access so you can place in-app voice calls and record Listen Mode sessions. The app only accesses the microphone after your device-level permission prompt and your in-app action.
If you import documents or create support requests, the app only sends that content when you explicitly choose to upload or submit it.
bullets: Microphone permission for voice calling and recorded speech features
Document picker access only when you choose to import a file
No background phone monitoring or third-party ad tracking

sections.title: Third-Party Services
body: We use third-party infrastructure providers to operate Emmaline. These providers process data on our behalf to deliver specific parts of the service.
Your use of Emmaline may involve the services listed below depending on which features you use.
bullets: Twilio for voice calling and phone infrastructure
OpenAI for transcription, summarization, and AI response generation
Google Cloud for some speech recognition and text-to-speech features
Supabase for application data storage and account-related records
Resend for support and waitlist or newsletter-related email delivery when configured

sections.title: Retention
body: We keep information for as long as needed to operate the service, meet legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce agreements.
If you delete your account, we will remove or de-identify account-linked data from active systems, subject to backup, fraud-prevention, or legal retention needs.
bullets: Account and consent records are retained for compliance and audit purposes
Call, transcript, note, and reader content are retained until you delete them or your account is deleted, unless a shorter retention rule is introduced
Support requests may be retained to resolve the issue and document outcomes

sections.title: Your Choices and Rights
body: You can review the Privacy Policy and Terms of Use inside the app and on the website.
You can contact us to request account access, export help, correction help, or deletion support. We also provide an in-app account deletion path for authenticated users.
bullets: Access and review your account information in the app
Request support, deletion, or account-data help at support@emmaline.app
Unsubscribe from marketing emails at any time
Request account-data access or export support through our support channel

sections.title: Children's Privacy
body: Emmaline is not directed to children under 13, and we do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.
If you believe a child under 13 has provided personal information to Emmaline, contact support@emmaline.app so we can investigate and remove the information if appropriate.

sections.title: Contact Us
body: For privacy questions, deletion requests, export requests, or support, contact support@emmaline.app.

termsOfService.title: Terms of Use
intro: Emmaline is a product of Planting Moon LLC, located at 5830 E 2nd St, Ste 7000 #35119, Casper, Wyoming 82609.
These Terms of Use govern your access to and use of the Emmaline app, website, and related services.
By creating an account or using Emmaline, you agree to these Terms of Use and our Privacy Policy.

sections.title: Eligibility and Accounts
body: You are responsible for the accuracy of your account information and for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials.
You may not use Emmaline in violation of law, to infringe the rights of others, or to submit harmful, fraudulent, or abusive content.

sections.title: Service Description
body: Emmaline offers voice-assisted AI features including calling, transcription, summaries, notes, reader tools, and related account services.
Some outputs are generated by AI systems and may be incomplete, inaccurate, or unsuitable for high-risk decisions. You are responsible for reviewing and using outputs appropriately.

sections.title: Acceptable Use
body: You agree not to misuse Emmaline, interfere with the service, reverse engineer restricted components, attempt unauthorized access, or use the service to violate the privacy or rights of others.
bullets: Do not use the service for unlawful harassment, fraud, or abuse
Do not attempt to access another user's data or account
Do not upload content you do not have permission to use

sections.title: Subscriptions and Billing
body: If Emmaline offers paid subscriptions, those subscriptions may be purchased through the Apple App Store, Google Play, or subscription infrastructure providers that support our app billing operations.

Subscriptions renew automatically unless canceled before the renewal date. You can manage or cancel subscriptions through the platform where you purchased them. If restore purchases is available in the app, you should use it when changing devices or reinstalling the app.
bullets: Charges are billed in advance according to the plan shown at purchase
Trials, promotional pricing, and entitlements may change or end according to the offer terms
Refund requests are generally handled by the app store or billing platform used for the purchase
We may use a provider such as RevenueCat to manage subscription state, restore entitlements, and synchronize billing events

sections.title: Account Management and Deletion
body: You may request deletion of your Emmaline account through the in-app settings flow or by contacting support@emmaline.app.
Deleting your account may permanently remove access to transcripts, notes, reader history, and related data linked to the account.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
body: Emmaline and its service materials are owned by us or our licensors. Except for the rights granted to you to use the service, we reserve all rights not expressly granted.

sections.title: Disclaimers and Liability
body: Emmaline is provided on an as-is and as-available basis. To the maximum extent permitted by law, we disclaim warranties not expressly stated in these terms.
To the maximum extent permitted by law, Emmaline will not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or for decisions made based on AI-generated outputs.

sections.title: Changes and Contact
body: We may update these Terms of Use from time to time. If we make material changes, we may update the effective date and provide notice where required.
For terms, billing, support, or deletion questions, contact support@emmaline.app.

eula.title: End User License Agreement
intro: This End User License Agreement ("EULA") is a binding agreement between you ("you" or "End User") and Planting Moon LLC, a Wyoming limited liability company located at 5830 E 2nd St, Ste 7000 #35119, Casper, Wyoming 82609 ("Company," "we," "us," or "our"), governing your use of the Emmaline mobile application and any related documentation (collectively, the "App").
By downloading, installing, or using the App, you agree to be bound by the terms of this EULA. If you do not agree to this EULA, do not download, install, or use the App.

sections.title: License Grant
body: Subject to your compliance with this EULA, the Company grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to download, install, and use the App on a device that you own or control, solely for your personal, non-commercial purposes, and as permitted by the usage rules of the Apple App Store or Google Play Store, as applicable.

This license does not allow you to use the App on any device you do not own or control, and you may not distribute or make the App available over a network where it could be used by multiple devices at the same time.

sections.title: License Restrictions
body: You agree not to, and you will not permit others to:
bullets: Copy, modify, adapt, translate, or create derivative works of the App, in whole or in part
Reverse engineer, decompile, disassemble, or otherwise attempt to derive the source code of the App, except to the extent such restriction is expressly prohibited by applicable law
Rent, lease, lend, sell, sublicense, assign, distribute, publish, transfer, or otherwise make the App available to any third party
Remove, alter, or obscure any proprietary notices, labels, or marks on the App
Use the App in any manner that violates applicable law, regulation, or the rights of any third party
Use the App to transmit any viruses, malware, or other harmful code
Use the App in connection with any automated system, bot, or scraping tool not authorized by us

sections.title: Ownership and Intellectual Property
body: The App is licensed, not sold, to you. The Company and its licensors own and retain all right, title, and interest in and to the App, including all copyrights, patents, trademarks, trade secrets, and other intellectual property rights therein.
This EULA does not grant you any ownership rights in the App. All rights not expressly granted to you in this EULA are reserved by the Company and its licensors.

The name "Emmaline," the Emmaline logo, and all related names, logos, product and service names, designs, and slogans are trademarks of the Company or its affiliates. You may not use such marks without the prior written permission of the Company.

sections.title: Third-Party Services
body: The App may display, include, or make available third-party content, services, or integrations, including but not limited to AI processing services, voice infrastructure providers, and payment processors.

The Company does not assume responsibility for third-party content or services. Any use of third-party services is subject to the applicable third party's terms and policies, and you use them at your own risk.

sections.title: User Content and AI-Generated Outputs
body: You retain ownership of the content you submit through the App, such as audio recordings, uploaded documents, notes, and messages ("User Content"). By submitting User Content, you grant the Company a worldwide, royalty-free, non-exclusive license to use, process, store, and transmit your User Content solely as necessary to provide and improve the App's features.

The App may generate responses, transcripts, summaries, notes, and other outputs using artificial intelligence ("AI Outputs"). AI Outputs are generated algorithmically and may be incomplete, inaccurate, or unsuitable for high-risk decisions. You are solely responsible for reviewing and evaluating AI Outputs before relying on them. The Company does not warrant the accuracy, completeness, or fitness of AI Outputs for any particular purpose.

sections.title: Subscriptions and Automatic Renewal
body: Certain features of the App may require a paid subscription. Subscription terms, pricing, and features are described within the App and in the applicable app store listing.

Subscriptions automatically renew unless canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current subscription period. Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours before the end of the current period, at the then-current subscription price.
You can manage and cancel subscriptions through your Apple ID account settings or Google Play account settings, as applicable. Deleting the App does not cancel your subscription.

sections.title: Disclaimer of Warranties
body: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, THE APP IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE," WITH ALL FAULTS AND WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND. THE COMPANY DISCLAIMS ALL WARRANTIES, WHETHER EXPRESS, IMPLIED, STATUTORY, OR OTHERWISE, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO THE IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, TITLE, QUIET ENJOYMENT, ACCURACY, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT OF THIRD-PARTY RIGHTS.

WITHOUT LIMITING THE FOREGOING, THE COMPANY DOES NOT WARRANT THAT THE APP WILL BE UNINTERRUPTED, ERROR-FREE, SECURE, OR FREE OF HARMFUL COMPONENTS, OR THAT ANY DEFECTS WILL BE CORRECTED. YOU ASSUME ALL RISK FOR ANY DAMAGE TO YOUR DEVICE OR DATA THAT MAY RESULT FROM YOUR USE OF THE APP.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
body: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, IN NO EVENT SHALL THE COMPANY, ITS AFFILIATES, OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, AGENTS, OR LICENSORS BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, EXEMPLARY, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION LOSS OF PROFITS, LOSS OF DATA, BUSINESS INTERRUPTION, PERSONAL INJURY, OR PROPERTY DAMAGE, ARISING OUT OF OR RELATED TO YOUR USE OF OR INABILITY TO USE THE APP, HOWEVER CAUSED AND REGARDLESS OF THE THEORY OF LIABILITY (CONTRACT, TORT, OR OTHERWISE), EVEN IF ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGES.

IN NO EVENT SHALL THE COMPANY'S TOTAL AGGREGATE LIABILITY TO YOU FOR ALL CLAIMS ARISING OUT OF OR RELATED TO THIS EULA EXCEED THE AMOUNT YOU PAID FOR THE APP, IF ANY, IN THE TWELVE (12) MONTHS PRECEDING THE EVENT GIVING RISE TO THE CLAIM, OR FIFTY UNITED STATES DOLLARS (USD $50.00), WHICHEVER IS GREATER.

THE FOREGOING LIMITATIONS SHALL APPLY EVEN IF THE REMEDIES PROVIDED UNDER THIS EULA FAIL OF THEIR ESSENTIAL PURPOSE. SOME JURISDICTIONS DO NOT ALLOW THE EXCLUSION OR LIMITATION OF CERTAIN DAMAGES, SO SOME OR ALL OF THE ABOVE LIMITATIONS MAY NOT APPLY TO YOU.

sections.title: Termination
body: This EULA is effective until terminated by you or the Company. The Company may terminate this EULA at any time, with or without notice, if you fail to comply with any term of this EULA.

Upon termination, all rights granted to you under this EULA shall immediately cease, and you must cease all use of the App and delete all copies of the App from your devices. The provisions of this EULA relating to intellectual property, disclaimers, limitations of liability, and any other provisions that by their nature should survive termination shall survive any termination of this EULA.

sections.title: Governing Law and Dispute Resolution
body: This EULA shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Wyoming, without regard to its conflict of law principles.

Any dispute arising out of or relating to this EULA shall first be attempted to be resolved informally by contacting us at support@emmaline.app. If the dispute cannot be resolved informally within thirty (30) days, either party may pursue resolution through binding arbitration in Casper, Wyoming, or through small claims court if the claim qualifies.
You agree that any dispute resolution proceedings will be conducted only on an individual basis and not in a class, consolidated, or representative action.

sections.title: U.S. Government End Users
body: The App and related documentation are "Commercial Items" as defined in 48 C.F.R. § 2.101, consisting of "Commercial Computer Software" and "Commercial Computer Software Documentation." If you are an agency, department, or other entity of the United States Government, your use of the App is subject to the terms of this EULA consistent with federal procurement law.

sections.title: Export Compliance
body: You agree to comply with all applicable export and re-export control laws and regulations, including the Export Administration Regulations maintained by the U.S. Department of Commerce, and trade and economic sanctions maintained by the U.S. Treasury Department's Office of Foreign Assets Control.

You represent that you are not located in, under the control of, or a national or resident of any country subject to U.S. embargo or sanctions, and that you are not listed on any U.S. Government list of prohibited or restricted parties.

sections.title: Apple App Store Additional Terms
body: If you downloaded the App from the Apple App Store, the following additional terms apply:

This EULA is between you and the Company, not Apple Inc. ("Apple"). Apple is not responsible for the App or its content. Apple has no obligation whatsoever to furnish any maintenance or support services with respect to the App.

In the event of any failure of the App to conform to any applicable warranty, you may notify Apple, and Apple will refund the purchase price, if any, for the App to you. To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, Apple will have no other warranty obligation whatsoever with respect to the App.

Apple is not responsible for addressing any claims by you or any third party relating to the App or your possession and/or use of the App, including but not limited to product liability claims, claims that the App fails to conform to any applicable legal or regulatory requirement, and claims arising under consumer protection, data protection, or similar legislation.

Apple and Apple's subsidiaries are third-party beneficiaries of this EULA. Upon your acceptance of this EULA, Apple will have the right (and will be deemed to have accepted the right) to enforce this EULA against you as a third-party beneficiary.

sections.title: General Provisions
body: If any provision of this EULA is held to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.
The Company's failure to enforce any right or provision of this EULA shall not constitute a waiver of such right or provision.

This EULA, together with our Privacy Policy and Terms of Use (available within the App and at www.emmaline.app), constitutes the entire agreement between you and the Company regarding your use of the App and supersedes all prior agreements and understandings.

The Company may update this EULA from time to time. Material changes will be communicated through the App or by email. Your continued use of the App after the effective date of any changes constitutes your acceptance of the updated EULA.

sections.title: Contact Information
body: For questions about this EULA, or to report a violation, contact us at:
Email: support@emmaline.app
Address: Planting Moon LLC, 5830 E 2nd St, Ste 7000 #35119, Casper, Wyoming 82609
